history.content:
Student mentioned difficulty maintaining consistent revision after office hours due to fatigue.

  • Revision happening only during weekends
  • Student watching too many strategy videos
  • Answer writing almost stopped for the last 2 weeks

Suggested plan: daily revision block for 2 hours, Sunday answer writing practice, reduce YouTube consumption.

Student is struggling to recall Polity concepts discussed last week.
Advised them to revise the fundamental rights chapter before moving to the next module.

Follow up regarding the mock test 4 performance.
Need to call on Friday evening to discuss the test analysis report.

Student feeling mentally exhausted after comparing progress with toppers online.

  • Avoid unnecessary comparison
  • Focus only on daily consistency
  • Take one relaxed evening every week

Student reported payment failure while upgrading the batch.
Issue forwarded to tech team.
Ticket ID: #4492

Brief catch-up call. Everything is going smoothly.
No major concerns raised by the student.

Student unable to connect current affairs with static syllabus.

  • Monthly magazine revision missing
  • Facts forgotten quickly
  • Low note revision frequency

Recommendation: weekly revision tracker required.
Called student but no response. Left a WhatsApp message to schedule the pending mentorship slot.

Student requested change in mentor due to language preference (wants Hindi speaking mentor).
Request approved and reassigned to Meena Sharma.

Discussed improvement areas in answer writing.

  • Better introductions
  • Improved handwriting

Still needs work on:

  • Examples are generic
  • Conclusion quality inconsistent
